Class SPGConfig.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig.Builder
Enclosing class:
SPGConfig
public static final class SPGConfig.Builder extends Object
Fluent builder for SPGConfig.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Hemant Naik

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Builds and returns an immutable SPGConfig.

    Enables or disables the heuristic (regex) detection layer.

    Sets the minimum severity score (1–10) a match must have to be included in results.

    Sets the Naive Bayes posterior probability threshold for the ML layer.
    SPGConfig.Builder

    Enables or disables the ML (Naive Bayes) detection layer.

  • Method Details

    • redactionMode

      public SPGConfig.Builder redactionMode(PIITokenizer.RedactionMode mode)
      Sets the output redaction mode.
      Parameters:
      mode - PIITokenizer.RedactionMode.TOKEN (default), MASK, or BLANK

    • mlConfidenceThreshold

      public SPGConfig.Builder mlConfidenceThreshold(double threshold)
      Sets the Naive Bayes posterior probability threshold for the ML layer. Lower values increase recall; higher values increase precision. Default: 0.65.
      Parameters:
      threshold - value in (0.0, 1.0]

    • enabledTypes

      public SPGConfig.Builder enabledTypes(Set<PIIType> types)
      Restricts detection to the specified PII types. Passing an empty set (or calling this method with no arguments) enables all types.
      Parameters:
      types - the subset of types to detect

    • minimumSeverity

      public SPGConfig.Builder minimumSeverity(int severity)
      Sets the minimum severity score (1–10) a match must have to be included in results. Useful for high-throughput paths that should only care about the most sensitive data (e.g. >= 8 for SSN/credit-card/API-key only).
      Parameters:
      severity - minimum severity; default is 1

    • buildReverseMap

      public SPGConfig.Builder buildReverseMap(boolean build)
      Controls whether the reverse token-to-original map is populated. Disable if you never need to de-tokenise for a minor performance gain.
      Parameters:
      build - true to populate the map (default)

    • heuristicEnabled

      public SPGConfig.Builder heuristicEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enables or disables the heuristic (regex) detection layer. Disabling is useful for benchmarking or if you only want ML results.

    • mlEnabled

      public SPGConfig.Builder mlEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enables or disables the ML (Naive Bayes) detection layer. Disabling is useful for ultra-low-latency paths where only obvious structural PII needs to be caught.

    • build

      public SPGConfig build()
      Builds and returns an immutable SPGConfig.
